MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITALS (dba CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER) DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S MEDICAL MALPRACTICE NEGLIGENCE COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Jack Lin, Esq. of Varian Medical Systems, Inc. 650/251-5515 for pltf & opposing party; Marcel Patrick Neri, Esq. of Hassard Bonnington LLP 288-9800 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Plaintiff filed an opposition this morning. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified: Sustained with ten days leave to amend. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
